scale_source: synthetic — PDF user space units treated as PT_TO_M=0.0352 like planta_74; not physically anchored

rooms.label: COZINHA T
notes: HALL is the long bottom rectangle, ~588x108 pt. Wide range
to absorb watershed clipping when concave-hull is enabled

rooms.label: SUITE T
rooms.source: synthetic — TOP_RIGHT in EXAMPLE_SPEC_3_ROOM_T (gap1 to HALL)

notes: 50-pt wall_gap on the H divider y=140, x=460..510. The detector
emits one open_passage; the room-context classifier upgrades to
interior_passage when both sides have known room labels.
Cycle 11e (2026-05-08) — synthetic ground truth paired with
ONE interior gap (between HALL and the right top room) keeps
watershed unambiguous; the SALA-T side is a fully closed
horizontal divider to avoid two-seed competition for the same
gap region. Round-trip test runs the pipeline with
stage carves T-shape envelopes into broken polygons because the
envelope traces the divider walls, leaving HALL as a sliver).
